title: senecio eriophyton
intro: Senecio eriophyton, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio eriophyton include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and treat wounds and skin irritations. Senecio eriophyton can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for use in herbal remedies, although it is essential to use caution and consult with a healthcare professional before consuming it due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
